title: Verilator bug in signed/unsigned expression eval

features.name: signed localparam addition in unsigned expression context
features.description: Code should include a signed localparam addition where the result is used in an unsigned expression context, requiring zero-extension rather than sign-extension

features.name: signed localparam with MSB set bit pattern
features.description: Code should include a signed localparam with a bit pattern having the MSB set, where the signed interpretation differs from unsigned interpretation
